nom. inval.    Published as a comb. & stat. nov. based on Silene ouensae Coss., which is not validly published. The authors also provide a full and direct reference to 'S.Boryi var. tejedensis J. et M.' (cited therein as S. boryi var. tejedensis (Boiss.) Willk.). Art. 41.8.(a) cannot be applied because of the indirect reference to S. tejedensis Boiss.
